allow: PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression; try { $pdfPath = "d:\\GitHub\\remote-lab\\public\\doc\\การทดลองที่ 08.pdf"; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($pdfPath\); $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes\); $text | Select-String -Pattern "[฀-๿]+" | Select-Object -First 50 | ForEach-Object { $_.Matches.Value } } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell(Add-Type -AssemblyName System.IO.Compression; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\("d:\\GitHub\\remote-lab\\public\\doc\\data 8 สนามแม่เหล็ก.pdf"\); $text = [System.Text.Encoding]::Latin1.GetString\($bytes\); $lines = $text -split '\\n' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'BT|ET|Tf|Tj|TJ' } | Select-Object -First 80; $lines -join "`n")

PowerShell($files = @\("การทดลองที่ 08.pdf", "data 8 สนามแม่เหล็ก.pdf", "การทดลองที่ 08 สนามแม่เหล็ก.pdf"\); foreach \($f in $files\) { $path = "d:\\GitHub\\remote-lab\\public\\doc\\$f"; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($path\); Write-Host "=== $f \($\($bytes.Length\) bytes\) ==="; $ascii = [System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetString\($bytes\) -replace '[^\\x20-\\x7E]',' '; $words = \($ascii -split '\\s+'\) | Where-Object { $_.Length -gt 3 -and $_ -notmatch '^[^a-zA-Z0-9]+$' } | Select-Object -Unique -First 100; Write-Host \($words -join ' '\); Write-Host '' })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "d:\\GitHub\\remote-lab\\app" -Recurse -Force | Select-Object FullName, @{Name='Type';Expression={if\($_.PSIsContainer\){'DIR'}else{'FILE'}}} | Sort-Object FullName | Format-Table -AutoSize)

Bash(node -e "const a = require\('animejs'\); console.log\('scrambleText:', typeof a.scrambleText, 'morphTo:', typeof a.morphTo, 'stagger:', typeof a.stagger, 'animate:', typeof a.animate, 'onScroll:', typeof a.onScroll\)")
